title: Final report schema and traceability check
scope: Validated final JSON report structure and claim traceability before independent factual verification. No broad factual web audit was performed.

json_parse.method: jq empty and Python json.loads on the final report and referenced worker handoffs

notes: All objects using a kind label have non-empty citations.
The executive summary bottom line and key findings cite worker source_refs.
All four decision_paths include citations at the decision-path object level.
All four implementation_paths include citations at the implementation-path object level.
No major recommendation was found without either source-backed citations or an explicit inference/recommendation label. This is a traceability check, not independent factual verification.
VS Code and Obsidian are addressed separately in option_matrix, decision_paths, and implementation_paths.
Joint/cross-editor approaches are addressed through shared local/API backend options and implementation paths.

corrections_applied.description: Added claim_labeling definitions for fact_plus_inference and fact_plus_recommendation because those composite kind values were used in the report but not previously defined.

not_checked: No extension/plugin installation or runtime UX test was performed.
No broad factual web audit was performed; T060 should independently verify current product, pricing, and policy claims.
No browser automation or sessionful retrieval was used.
